title: FOOGO Green 25pcs 12oz Disposable Strong Triple-Wall Brown Paper Coffee Cups with Secure Lids, FSC® Certified, Fully Compostable, for Hot Drinks, Takeaway and Parties
features: HEAT-RESISTANT paper cups - FOOGO Green triple-walled paper cups are made from three layers of high quality paper, making them highly resistant to heat. Our disposable cups are perfect not only for serving hot or cold drinks in cafes and restaurants but also for use at home.

Our coffee cups are FSC CERTIFIED and made from paper that is sourced in a socially and environmentally responsible manner. As a brand, we are committed to ensuring healthy, resilient forests for all.
LEAK-PROOF SECURE LIDS - The lids are designed to fit the cups perfectly, avoiding leaks and spills when on the go or driving in a car.
PREMIUM QUALITY and STURDY - The triple-wall structure ensures shape retention even after multiple refills. The ripple design on the outer wall offers an ergonomic grip for the fast-paced to-go days.
ECO-FRIENDLY and COMPOSTABLE - The cups are fully compostable in 4 weeks under the right conditions.
description: FOOGO Green Disposable Paper Coffee Cups with Lids – the perfect solution for your on-the-go coffee needs! These cups are crafted with care to provide a reliable and eco-friendly option for hot beverages, ensuring a delightful drinking experience wherever you are. Our triple-wall brown paper cups offer superior insulation, keeping your drinks hot and your hands cool. The sturdy construction not only provides durability but also adds a touch of elegance to your coffee moments. The triple-wall design ensures that the cups are comfortable to hold, making them ideal for enjoying your favorite hot drinks without the need for a sleeve. The secure lids included with each cup prevent spills and leaks, allowing you to confidently carry your coffee without worrying about messes. The tight seal ensures that your beverage stays at the perfect temperature while preventing any accidents during transport. FOOGO Green is committed to sustainability, and our disposable paper cups are eco-friendly and compostable. Made from responsibly sourced materials, these cups reduce environmental impact, making them the perfect choice for those who prioritize green living. These coffee cups are not just practical but also versatile. Whether you're grabbing your morning coffee, hosting a party, or organizing a corporate event, these cups are perfect for any occasion. The neutral brown color and minimalist design complement any setting, adding a touch of sophistication to your beverage service. Say goodbye to single-use plastic and embrace the convenience of FOOGO Green Disposable Paper Coffee Cups with Lids. Order your pack today and enjoy the perfect blend of quality, functionality, and sustainability!
